hooks.command: MEMORY=/Users/octiv/.claude/projects/-Users-octiv-Octiv-MVP/memory/MEMORY.md; CLAUDE=/Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP/CLAUDE.md; echo '--- Octiv Session Context ---'; if [ -f "$MEMORY" ]; then echo "Memory: $(wc -l < $MEMORY) lines, last updated $(stat -f '%Sm' $MEMORY 2>/dev/null)"; fi; git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null; echo '---'
